tools.description: Multi-use bash script for auditing wireless networks, supporting WEP/WPA/WPA2/WPA3 handshakes, evil twin, WPS, and PMKID attacks.
Automated wireless network auditor that orchestrates WPS, WPA, WEP, and PMKID attacks against Wi-Fi targets.
Rogue AP framework that performs social-engineering WiFi key retrieval via evil-twin and captive-portal attacks.
Featureful rogue access point implementation of hostapd with WPA2-Enterprise credential capture and karma-style attacks.
Complete suite of tools to assess WiFi network security, including monitoring, packet injection, and WEP/WPA cracking.
Targeted evil-twin attacks against WPA2-Enterprise networks and indirect wireless pivots via hostile portals.
Rogue access point framework for conducting red team engagements and Wi-Fi security testing with phishing capabilities.
Powerful Python framework for rogue access point attacks and wireless MITM operations.
Swiss Army knife for 802.11, BLE, HID, and IPv4/IPv6 network reconnaissance and MITM attacks.
Community fork of Reaver, a brute-force and offline pixie-dust attack tool against WPS registrar PINs.
C implementation of the WPS brute-force attack, designed as a robust alternative to Reaver.
Offline Wi-Fi Protected Setup brute-force utility that exploits low-entropy implementations (pixie-dust attack).
Small WLAN capture tool designed to identify weak points in Wi-Fi networks by running layer-2 attacks against WPA.
Set of tools to convert captured Wi-Fi packets into hash formats usable with Hashcat or John the Ripper.
Modified hostapd (Wireless Pwnage Edition) for AP impersonation and 802.1X credential capture attacks.
Wireless network detector, sniffer, and WIDS with extensive 802.11 capture and analysis support.
Powerful Python-based interactive packet manipulation program and library used to forge and decode 802.11 frames.
World's fastest and most advanced password recovery utility, used to crack captured WPA/WPA2 handshakes.
John the Ripper jumbo offline password cracker, supporting WPA/WPA2-PSK hashes among hundreds of formats.
Affordable ESP8266-based Wi-Fi hacking platform for testing 802.11 networks via deauth, beacon, and probe attacks.
Python framework for pentesters that facilitates evil-twin attacks and other Wi-Fi vulnerabilities using hostapd-wpe, dnsmasq, Scapy, and mitmproxy.
Highly Optimized Radio Scanning Tool, a lightweight IEEE 802.11 wireless LAN analyzer with a text interface.
Continuously jam all Wi-Fi clients and routers by sending channel-hopping deauthentication frames via Scapy.
Companion site and proof-of-concept tooling for the KRACK (Key Reinstallation Attack) research against WPA2.
